phrases.intent_en: Can I get a take-away bag for phyllo pastries?
phrases.text_local: Μπορώ να πάρω σακούλα για τα φύλλα;
phrases.cultural_note: Take-away bags are standard at Greek bakeries but may need to be requested explicitly.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at the side, take one.

responses.english: Yes, at the side, take one.

phrases.intent_en: How do I point-order at the counter?
phrases.cultural_note: Point-and-choose is common in Greek bakeries. Staff expect customers to point at items and name them.

phrases.intent_en: Is bougatsa cream pie still available now?
phrases.cultural_note: In small local bakeries, staff may confirm availability by checking behind the counter or in the display case.

phrases.text_local: Υπάρχει χώρος για να φάω το κουλούρι;
phrases.cultural_note: Many Greek bakeries are take-away only. Seating may be limited or require confirmation.

likely_response.local: Ναι, δίπλα στον πάγκο των γλυκών.
likely_response.translation_en: Hello, yes, there is a small table next to the dessert counter, but in the morning there is a queue and you may need to wait a bit.

responses.english: Hello, yes, there is a small table next to the dessert counter, but in the morning there is a queue and you may need to wait a bit.
responses.local: Ναι, δίπλα στον πάγκο των γλυκών.
